title: pyxidaria alsinodes
intro: Pyxidaria alsinodes, also known as the earthball or pyxidaria, is a type of lichenized fungus that belongs to the family Pyxidariaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The earthball is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
